introSection: Manta is a launched roller coaster located at SeaWorld San Diego in San Diego, California, USA. This ride was originally planned to open around 2010, however it was postponed because of renovations to the park's dolphin show Blue Horizons. Manta opened to park members on May 24, 2012, when it opened to the general public two days later on May 26, 2012.

sections.title: History
sections.content:
Track began arriving onsite in October 2011.

The first section of track was installed by November 1, 2011.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: Manta is a custom Launch Coaster installation from Mack Rides. The track consists of 98 sections supported by 100 support columns.

fullText:
Manta is a launched roller coaster located at SeaWorld San Diego in San Diego, California, USA. This ride was originally planned to open around 2010, however it was postponed because of renovations to the park's dolphin show Blue Horizons. Manta opened to park members on May 24, 2012, when it opened to the general public two days later on May 26, 2012.

Track began arriving onsite in October 2011.

The first section of track was installed by November 1, 2011.

Manta is a custom Launch Coaster installation from Mack Rides. The track consists of 98 sections supported by 100 support columns.
